external_dependency.notes: autoMemoryDirectory is bootstrapped into gitignored .claude/settings.local.json as an absolute repo-local path; all durable Phase 2 evidence lives under .claude/state/compactions/ and .claude/state/agents/, both git-visible.

remaining_risks: The real workstation's pre-existing .claude/settings.local.json was intentionally left unmodified by this session; bootstrap runs on the next real SessionStart hook invocation.
PostCompact has no decision-control channel per the documented hook contract; restoration happens at the following SessionStart by design, not as a gap.
No external memory index was built; status always reports recovery.source == "native-files".
Phases 3-7 remain incomplete and are not implicitly validated by these Phase 2 changes.
next_goal: Phase 2 is complete. Leave Phase 3 untouched until explicitly directed.
